name: orrgal1
description: orrgal1 — self-contained, repo-agnostic Claude Code plugins (forge, diagnose, ralph, persona, reviewable, devloop)

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Self-contained PR forge chain: /forge-setup maps host-repo tooling into a gitignored .forge/ dir, then the chain drives a PR from a source brief through goals, scenarios, tests, design, impl, audit, CI, and lens-designed review to READY. No dependency on other plugins.

plugins.name: diagnose
plugins.description: Portable, repo-agnostic diagnostic toolkit — /root-cause, /hypothesize, /pepper, /trace. No dependency on other plugins.

plugins.name: ralph
plugins.description: /ralph — general bounded-autonomy iteration loop toward any verifiable target; grinds to green, commits each step, stops at success or budget. Self-contained, repo-agnostic.

plugins.name: persona
plugins.description: Simple inlined persona — /setup-persona writes ~/.claude/persona.md (idempotent) and ensures CLAUDE.md @-imports it. No dependency on other plugins.

plugins.name: reviewable
plugins.description: Reviewable.io automation via agent-browser — /reviewable-read, /reviewable-reply, /reviewable-publish, /reviewable-login. Repo-agnostic (resolves owner/repo from git origin).

plugins.name: devloop
plugins.description: Thin stacked-PR dev-loop skills — /restack (bring a PR's base into its branch, merge/rebase per operator preference, syncing base with upstream first), /restack-all (same across a stack, bottom-up), /deslop (strip AI slop from a PR diff, reusing /simplify). Infers PR topology from GitHub, falls back to raw git. No dependency on other plugins.
